description: Admin action audit logs - track all administrative operations for security and accountability
authentication: Bearer JWT token required, super_admin only

endpoints.name: Get Admin Logs
endpoints.description: Retrieve all admin action logs with admin info

frontendUsage.frontendDescription: Displays chronological list of all admin actions (product edits, order status changes, settings updates, etc.) with admin name, email, role, IP address, and timestamp

endpoints.frontendDisplay: Activity timeline/table with timestamp, action description, admin avatar/name, admin role badge, IP address. Sorted newest first. May include pagination.
